basic_details.short_information: Hindustan Shipyard Limited (HSL) Recruitment 2026 for 3 posts of Deputy Project Officer (Technical). Candidates with Graduate / Diploma Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 13-05-2026, and closes on 03-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through HSL official website hslvizag.in/en/.

qualification.education_qualification: Full time Graduate / Diploma with not less than 55% marks in Mechanical / Electrical / Shipwright & Equivalent

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the HSL Deputy Project Officer (Technical) Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: HSL Deputy Project Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
